name: Chang'e 4 / Yutu-2
fact: The first spacecraft to land on the Moon's far side — technically and operationally the hardest lunar landing ever attempted. Required a relay satellite (Queqiao) at L2 since the far side has no direct radio contact with Earth. Yutu-2 has driven 1.9+ km, still active. The far side had never been visited.
capability: Demonstrated relay-satellite communications architecture for operations beyond direct line-of-sight — the exact pattern any Mars far-side or polar mission will need.
